title: Marcus Garvey and the Black Star
caption: The man behind the star on our logo. He launched the Black Star Line to connect the Black world.

title: Patrice Lumumba: a voice for sovereignty
caption: The first prime minister of independent Congo and what his removal meant for Africa.

title: Bob Marley and the message of Redemption
caption: How a son of Jamaica carried Black freedom songs to the world.
